anchor.text: Most people at some time, some place, had some kind of expectation about x

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Strong opening. The "x" is vague on purpose — keep it, it works.

anchor.text: Not in the happiness ≈ expectations way.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Good: you're drawing a line between your idea and the cliché version. Keep this boundary sharp.

anchor.text: This is smaller. More specific. More *you* shaped.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: This pivot is doing real work. "you shaped" is the hook — everything after this earns its place because of this line.

anchor.text: You didn't. The rehearsal was just wrong.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: This is the thesis. Everything before it is setup. Everything after it is proof. Punchy. Leave it.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: This is where the essay finds its voice — the mundane examples. "The burger is mid" is doing more than most paragraphs.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Clean. Two words. Better than a paragraph.

anchor.text: You didn't. The track was imaginary.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Parallel structure with "The rehearsal was just wrong." Intentional? If yes, it works. If not, still works.

anchor.text: Most people fight reality. It goes badly. Every time.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: This rhythm is doing heavy lifting. The short sentences land.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: This is the best line in the essay. Don't bury it.

anchor.text: That's not a bug. That's the whole thing.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Strong close. Clean. No moral. No "so next time you..." Just the idea, left standing.
